steps.title: Identify the key difference in the notes
steps.content: The notes rate winged kelp's umami as moderate and arame's as high. The goal is to emphasize this difference in intensity.

steps.title: Find the choice that emphasizes this difference
steps.content: Choice B uses “although” to set up a contrast—both are brown seaweed, but one has greater umami intensity. Choices A and C don't signal any difference, and D shifts focus to other foods. That matches choice B — B is correct.
